title: koeleria gracilis
intro: Koeleria gracilis, also known as blue grama grass, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, Koeleria gracilis has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as lowering cholesterol levels and improving digestion, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Koeleria gracilis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its herbal preparations are often used to promote overall well-being and treat various health issues.
